raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jepſchu Nons/ Danijels
un Jjabs winnas Widdû buh-
tn/ tik teefcham kà es dſthwoju/
fakka tas Klungs KUNGS:
Tee nedś Dehlus nedś Meitas
tſglahbtu/ bet paſchi (ween)
jaur fawn Taifnbu tſglahbtu
fawu Dwehfeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas Klungs
KUNGS: Kad es arridsan fa-
was tfchetras Sohdibas/ Soh-
binu un Baddu/ un taanus
Swehrus/ un Mehri fnhtifchu
prett Jeruſalemt/ un tſdeldu Zil-
wekus un Lohpus no turrenes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr raugi/ tur atties
kahdi Atlizzinati/ kas Dehlus un
Meitas tſweddihs/ redś/ tee
nahks pee juhs/ un juhs redse-
feet kà winneem klahfees/ un
winnu Darrischanas/ un tap-
feet eepreezinati pahr to Launu-
nu/ ko es pahr Jeruſalemi wed-
difchu ar wiſtu zittu/ ko es pahr
teein weddis efmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta tee juhs eepreezinahs/
kad juhs winno Klahfchann/ un
winno Darrischanas redsefeet/
un juhs redsefeet/ ka es to ne ef-
nu bes Watnas darrijs wiſfu/
ko es eekſch tahś efmu darrijs/
fakka tas Klungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N ta KUNga Wahro
ne notikke us man/ kaē
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrus/ kaē
irr ta Wiḫna-Rohla Malka
wairak ka kahda zitta Malka/
ta Wiḫnu Stiha wairak ka zit
ta Malka Mescha?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig no ta tohp Malka
kaś Gabbals nemts un kahd
Darbs darrihts? arrigno ta toh
Wadsitis nemts/pee ka wart kah
du Ribku pakahrt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ ta tohp ugguni
nodohfa par Barribu/ tas Ug-
guns aprithj abbejus winna Ga-
lus/ un fadedsina winna Wi-
du/ warretu tas leeti derrecht p
kahda Darba?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Redsi/ kad tas wehl we-
fels bija/ tad ne tappe no ta-
nefahds Darbs darrihts/ zikim-
saki/ kad tas ugguns to irr n-
ebdihś un fadedsinajs/ arrig t-
wehl no tahś taptu kahds Dar-
darrihts?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ta fakka tas Klun-
KUNGS: Itt ka ta Wiḫ-
kohka Malka irr starp to zit-
Mescha Malku/ ko es ugguni-
nodohnu/ ka tas tohp no-ehs-
ta nodohſchu es tohs Jeruſ-
mes Eedſihwotajus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es zelfcbu fawn Wa-
prett teem/ ka tee uggunun-
isbehgs/ bet tas ugguns
aprithś/ un juhs fajuttifceet/
tas KUNGSesmu/ kad es fa-
Waigu efmu prett teem zehli
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
